title: Arrived with temporary housing
summary: Focus on registration readiness and first-week admin while temporary housing is in place.
firstWeekHighlights: Confirm move-in date and where official mail can reach you
Book or prepare municipality registration as soon as your address is active
Complete registration and receive your BSN
firstMonthHighlights: Set up utilities/internet if moving into longer-term housing

title: Arrived with a stable address
summary: With an address in place, prioritise registration, BSN and daily-life setup in order.
firstWeekHighlights: Confirm move-in date and mail access
Receive your BSN and note which steps depend on it

title: Family arrival
summary: Plan registration and family admin (school, childcare, healthcare) in a clear sequence.
firstWeekHighlights: Prepare registration documents for the whole household
Complete municipality registration and receive BSN
firstMonthHighlights: Review childcare, school and family registration follow-up

title: Job starting soon
summary: Align registration, BSN and banking with employer onboarding and first salary.
firstWeekHighlights: Prepare registration documents before your move-in date
Complete municipality registration and receive BSN early
Confirm payroll and bank account readiness with your employer
firstMonthHighlights: Ask employer about 30% ruling if relevant

title: South Africa – job starting soon
summary: Long-haul move with work start: plan registration and banking so salary and admin align.
firstWeekHighlights: Prepare registration documents before your move-in date
Complete municipality registration and receive BSN early
Confirm payroll and bank account readiness before first salary
Bring South Africa–issued official records if registration may need them
firstMonthHighlights: Check South African driving licence rules if you plan to drive
Read the South Africa → Netherlands country guide

title: India – family arrival
summary: Family move from India: prepare registration and family admin (school, documents) in sequence.
firstWeekHighlights: Prepare registration documents for the household
Complete municipality registration and receive BSN
Bring India-issued official records if registration or family admin may need them
firstMonthHighlights: Review childcare, school and family registration follow-up
Check Indian driving licence rules if you plan to drive
Read the India → Netherlands country guide

title: United States – temporary housing
summary: US → NL with temporary housing: focus on registration and first-week plan.
firstWeekHighlights: Confirm move-in date and where official mail can reach you
Book or prepare municipality registration as soon as your address is active
Bring US-issued official records if registration may need them
firstMonthHighlights: Set up utilities/internet if moving into longer-term housing
Check US driving licence rules if you plan to drive

title: Germany – near-distance arrival
summary: EU move from Germany: focus on registration order and first-week sequencing.
firstWeekHighlights: Plan banking and insurance in the first two weeks
firstMonthHighlights: Check Germany driving licence rules if you plan to drive
Read the Germany → Netherlands country guide

title: Brazil – long-haul, address pending
summary: Long-haul from Brazil with address still pending: track address-dependent tasks and plan registration when you have housing.
firstWeekHighlights: Track which tasks must wait for a stable address
Bring Brazil-issued official records when you have them for registration
firstMonthHighlights: Complete municipality registration once you have an address
Check Brazil driving licence rules if you plan to drive
Read the Brazil → Netherlands country guide
